originalTitle: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Says Iran Deal Near With Hormuz 'Opened'; Tesla, AI Stocks Near Buy Points
summary: President Donald Trump said Saturday that the U.S. and Iran are close to an interim deal that will open the Strait of Hormuz.
content: President Donald Trump said Saturday that the U.S. and Iran are close to an interim deal that will open the Strait of Hormuz.
chineseTitle: 道琼斯期货：特朗普称伊朗与霍尔木兹海峡的协议已“开启”；特斯拉、AI 股票接近买入点
chineseSummary: 唐纳德·特朗普总统周六表示，美国和伊朗即将达成开放霍尔木兹海峡的临时协议。
chineseContent: 唐纳德·特朗普总统周六表示，美国和伊朗即将达成开放霍尔木兹海峡的临时协议。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
